metric_caveats: Cap-25 validation slice with local Qwen3.6:35b; not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
S1 fields only: diagnosis, seizure_type, annotated_medication.
The only post guard added versus v4.11 is the promoted annotated-medication non-ASM/brand alias guard also used in clean S2/S5.
Run detached or from an external PowerShell window per local Qwen latency policy.
Proceed to full validation only if micro F1 exceeds S2 clean-ladder Qwen full or medication improves without diagnosis/seizure regression.
